title: Directory-level architectural abstraction
description:
- The responsibility of this directory is to provide a way to aggregate values in a generic manner.
- The classes in this directory collaborate by calling each other's methods to perform the aggregation.
- The architectural role or pattern of this directory is to implement the ValueAggregator interface and provide a way to aggregate values based on their type and id.
